hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
file_path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
sensitive_files = ['server.py', 'stripe_integration.py', 'admin_security.py', 'visa_api.py', 'auth']
if any(s in file_path for s in sensitive_files):
    print(json.dumps({'decision': 'allow', 'reason': f'SECURITY NOTE: Editing sensitive file {file_path}. Run ./security/scan-file.sh {file_path} after changes.'}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'decision': 'allow'}))
"

python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.loads(sys.stdin.read())
file_path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if file_path.endswith('.py'):
    import subprocess
    result = subprocess.run(['bandit', '-q', file_path], capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=15)
    if result.stdout.strip():
        issues = result.stdout.strip().count('>> Issue:')
        print(f'Bandit found {issues} security issue(s) in {file_path}')
        print(result.stdout[:500])
"

echo '=== Osprey Security Arsenal Active ===' && echo 'Available commands:' && echo '  ./security/scan-quick.sh    - Quick security scan (30s)' && echo '  ./security/scan-all.sh      - Full comprehensive scan' && echo '  ./security/scan-file.sh <f> - Scan specific file' && echo '  ./security/scan-semgrep.sh  - Semgrep with custom rules' && echo '=== REMINDER: This project handles sensitive immigration data and LIVE Stripe payments ==='
